Treasury TO52 End-to-End Workflow · 2026-06-12

AI-Engineer Workforce Program

Apprentice pipeline: sourcing → screening → interview → IRS approval → onboarding → training loop → capstone → placement.

Pipeline
7 stages + completion · batch-cycled — next batch restarts at sourcing
Delivery
Catalyte recruiting · curriculum · instruction  Fearless recruiting · interviews  GitRoll screening tool · assessment engine · dashboard  IRS / Treasury batch approval · placement
Training
Weekly assessment cycle · two tracks (beginner / advanced)

Click a stage to see its mechanism and system screenshots. Click a screenshot to enlarge.

Has GitHub history
GitRoll screening toolAssessment Engine subset · GitHub + LinkedIn inputs · SkillsGraph-based scoring
high score → fast-track to interview
No GitHub · entry level
Catalyte assessmentTraditional 2-hour assessment
pass → interview
